sectiondef.header: Clock source and divider helpers for Renesas RA devices.

briefdescription.para: Conditional property getter based on devicetree status.

detaileddescription.para: Returns the value of a devicetree property if the node is marked as okay. Otherwise, the provided default value is used.

briefdescription.para: Helper to get clock source form device tree.

detaileddescription.para: Expands to a BSP_CLOCKS_SOURCE_* constant when the node is enabled, or BSP_CLOCKS_CLOCK_DISABLED otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Helper to compute a clock divider.

detaileddescription.para: This macro expands to a RA_CGC_DIV_* prefix combined with a devicetree value.

briefdescription.para: Renesas RA Clock Generator Circuit (CGC) header file.
